overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a medieval great hall resembling a castle banquet room, filled with diners at long wooden tables beneath numerous hanging chandeliers. The scene features warm candlelight illuminating stone Gothic architecture with arched ceilings and tall windows, creating an atmospheric feast setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with banquet seating

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera slowly panning across the great hall, observing the dining crowd from above

notable_agents.action: diners seated at long wooden tables eating and conversing
group of figures in dark robes gathered around a table with food

entered.detail: tall pointed stone archways forming the ceiling structure of the great hall
numerous ornate chandeliers with lit candles suspended from the ceiling providing warm illumination
lengthy dark wooden banquet tables arranged in rows throughout the hall
colorful plates of food and drink spread across the table surfaces
massive stone pillars supporting the high vaulted ceiling
narrow arched windows at the far end of the hall allowing natural light to filter in
grey stone tile flooring reflecting the warm chandelier light

segments.scene_description: The camera holds an elevated view of a bustling medieval great hall rendered in a game engine, showcasing Gothic architecture with stone arches and hanging chandeliers. Numerous NPC diners sit at long wooden tables laden with colorful feast platters, eating and conversing in the warm mixed lighting of candles and window light. The scene remains stable with a slow panoramic drift across the banquet hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot features a slow, sweeping panoramic movement across a bustling medieval great hall, capturing the atmospheric scale of a royal banquet. It begins with an elevated perspective of the Gothic architecture, where stone arches and hanging chandeliers frame the expansive room. As the camera drifts, the view glides over long wooden tables laden with colorful feast platters and crowded with conversing diners. The scene then expands to reveal the interplay of warm candlelight and natural window light illuminating the stone interior before settling into a steady gaze across the lively feast.
